case_title: CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A. VS. ALICIA A OCAMPO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-09-2003 CONTINUED TO AUG-20-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). JUL-09-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
